description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a sprawling layout, featuring a large main building and an attached garage. The exterior is finished in light-colored walls with a dark, low-pitched roof, and extensive wooden decking surrounds a spacious swimming pool. A separate tennis court is connected to the main house by a narrow pathway, emphasizing the recreational amenities. The property includes multiple outdoor seating areas, landscaped greenery, and several large windows that provide ample natural light. The architectural style is clean and contemporary, with open spaces and a focus on outdoor living. The overall design suggests luxury and comfort, suitable for a high-end residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark roof, light walls, a pool, and a separate tennis court connected by a pathway. The design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and luxury amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a clear view of the tennis court in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, wooden deck, and outdoor seating, with the tennis court to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, deck, and the pathway leading to the tennis court, with the house's back facade visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional outdoor spaces, and the connection between the house and tennis court.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
